description: PRD excerpt with explicit user-observable product commitment
source: Members can pause their subscription for up to 90 days. During the pause period, no charges are applied. Members receive a confirmation email within 5 minutes of pausing.
rationale: Names a user role (Members), an observable behavior (pause subscription), a specific limit (90 days), a billing outcome (no charges), and a response SLA (5 min email). Bypasses Gate 1 and Gate 2 — the commitment itself is the decision.
